name: SomeIpGetData
title: SomeIpGetData
syntax: dword SomeIpGetData( dword messageHandle, dword bufferLength, char buffer[] ); // form 1
dword SomeIpGetData( dword messageHandle, dword bufferLength, byte buffer[] ); // form 2
dword SomeIpGetData( dword messageHandle, dword bufferLength, struct buffer[] ); // form 3
description: This function can be used to query the raw data of a SOME/IP message.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the received SOME/IP message (see OnSomeIpMessage)

parameters.name: bufferLength
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in bytes

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Data are copied to this buffer

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
